ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector within the industry */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the company went public */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the stock information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the user account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the historical price record being accessed */,
  "access_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the data was accessed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytical_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytical model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytical model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's purpose or methodology */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., regression, time series, machine learning) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the model */,
  "trained_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who trained the model */,
  "last_trained" TEXT /* Last date and time the model was trained */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model based on the latest training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytical_models_trained_by FOREIGN KEY ("trained_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analytical model used */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the historical price record that the model was run on */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted stock price from the model */,
  "actual_price" REAL /* Actual stock price from the historical data */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Metric used for evaluation (e.g., RMSE, MAE) */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the predicted price */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date for which the prediction was made */,
  "run_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the model */,
  "run_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES analytical_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_run_by FOREIGN KEY ("run_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
